title-group.article-title: Scalable Unified Python Package for Subsea CV at Petrobras

disp-quote.p: This initiative aims to create a robust, scalable Python package that will serve as a unified interface for all AI/ML and computer vision activities in the Subsea division. The package will abstract the complexity of accessing and managing large volumes of subsea media data (images, videos, reports) across multiple cloud and on-premises platforms. By enabling distributed processing and standardized workflows, the package will:

list-item.p: Accelerate project delivery by simplifying data access and experiment management.
Improve efficiency and reproducibility in handling massive, continuously growing datasets.
Foster collaboration through shared tools, documentation, and best practices.
Ensure compliance with Petrobras’ security and governance standards.
Lay the foundation for expansion to other divisions, multiplying the impact across the company.

disp-quote.p: The project will be piloted with four current subsea CV projects, with clear metrics for adoption, usability, and technical success. Lessons learned will guide future scaling and adoption.

title-group.article-title: OKR: Scalable Unified Python Package for Subsea CV at Petrobras

sec.title: Objective
sec.p: Develop and launch a scalable, unified Python package that abstracts access to AI/ML resources and tools for computer vision projects in the Subsea division, enabling efficient, distributed processing, experimentation, and management of large and continuously growing subsea media datasets (images, videos, reports). Success in these projects will serve as a model for broader adoption across Petrobras.

list-item.p: Deliver an architectural blueprint detailing integration points for AWS, Azure, GCP, Databricks, and Petrobras-specific tools, optimized for distributed CV workflows and large-scale data.
Define and document standard APIs for:
Secure, scalable data ingestion and access (video, image, report formats)
Experiment management (classification, segmentation, multi-task workflows)
Feature engineering and storage, designed for high-volume, high-throughput operations
Implement core modules and processing pipelines capable of distributed, parallel processing, demonstrated by successful handling of large, diverse subsea media datasets.
Achieve at least 80% code coverage in unit tests for all modules.
Integrate experiment tracking and comparison functionalities for CV models, supporting:
Versioning of datasets, models, and results
Automated logging of metrics and artifacts
Develop feature engineering and storage modules with:
Efficient storage, retrieval, and indexing of large-scale media and metadata
Metadata management for traceability, searchability, and auditability
Release a beta version to all 4 current subsea CV projects for pilot testing and feedback.
Achieve a minimum satisfaction score of 8/10 from pilot users regarding usability, integration, and performance in large-scale subsea workflows.
Publish comprehensive documentation and example notebooks covering:
End-to-end subsea CV workflows (from data ingestion to model deployment)
Best practices for handling massive media datasets and experiment management
Establish a governance model for package maintenance, including:
Contribution guidelines and code review process
Release management and versioning strategy
Ensure compliance with Petrobras’ security, privacy, and data governance standards for all integrated resources and media.
Demonstrate at least 2 successful end-to-end subsea CV projects using the package, showcasing improved efficiency, scalability, and project outcomes with large-scale data.
Plan and initiate onboarding for additional subsea projects, aiming for at least 6 projects using the package within 6 months of launch.
Document lessons learned, technical challenges, and success stories to support expansion to other Petrobras divisions.

sec.title: How Each Key Result Will Be Measured

list-item.p: Design & Architecture: Delivery and approval of architectural blueprint and API documentation, validated by technical leads and sample implementations.
Development & Integration: Successful processing and analysis of large, diverse subsea media datasets; automated test reports showing ≥80% code coverage; integration and performance benchmarks.
Usability & Adoption: Beta deployed to all 4 projects; user feedback surveys/interviews with ≥8/10 satisfaction; documentation and notebooks published and accessed.
Governance & Sustainability: Published governance model and guidelines; security/compliance audit reports; audit logs for traceability.
Impact & Expansion: Completion of 2+ end-to-end projects with before/after metrics; onboarding records for 6+ projects; documented lessons learned and success stories.
